title: Evangelions without LCL
wikitext:
[]: Evangelions without LCL Post by Logan Payne » Wed Apr 01, 2009 9:09 pm While watching Episode 8 again I noticed they got in the Eva without LCL. It's SOP to have the Eva filled after the pilot(s) get in. But is this just a mistake or continuity error or is this something else. Maybe the LCL is not necessary?

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 01, 2009 9:11 pm What I mentioned about this in IRC: [code:1]<SSD> doesn't it [LCL] fill up from a compartment when they're inside? <SSD> or it's at the bottom of the plug/off screen?[/code:1]

[]: Post by Legendary » Wed Apr 01, 2009 9:14 pm I suggested that the boat might have had emergency LCL for an Angel attack, and that it was pumped in when the dudes on the boat realized they were getting attacked and that Asuka was in the plug.

[]: Re: Evangelions without LCL Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 01, 2009 9:16 pm Logan Payne wrote: It's SOP to have the Eva filled after the pilot(s) get in. But is this just a mistake or continuity error or is this something else.

[]: Re: Evangelions without LCL Post by Logan Payne » Wed Apr 01, 2009 9:18 pm Reichu wrote: Logan Payne wrote: It's SOP to have the Eva filled after the pilot(s) get in. But is this just a mistake or continuity error or is this something else.

[]: Re: Evangelions without LCL Post by NemZ » Wed Apr 01, 2009 9:26 pm Logan Payne wrote: The core contains LCL with enough to spare for the entire entry plug?

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 01, 2009 10:32 pm In fact, the Instrumentality 101 thread is going to have a post about Eva cores and LCL very soon, as part of addressing the whole mystery of just WTF is LCL and where TF does it come from.

[]: Re: Evangelions without LCL Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Apr 02, 2009 1:19 am Reichu wrote: They've already showed us the "entry plug being flooded" sequence. Why waste screen time (and animation cells) showing it again?

[]: Post by ZapX » Thu Apr 02, 2009 1:26 am In Eva 2.0 Shinji will change into his plugsuit like this.

[]: Re: Evangelions without LCL Post by NemZ » Thu Apr 02, 2009 1:44 am Mr. Tines wrote: Stock footage henshin scenes are not unknown in the genre.

[]: Post by schismatics » Mon May 11, 2009 1:30 pm ZapalacX wrote: In Eva 2.0 Shinji will change into his plugsuit like this.

[]: Post by Alaska Slim » Mon May 11, 2009 6:37 pm schismatics wrote: That would require Shinji to be a man. WHICH HE IS NOT

[]: Post by PuppetChaos » Wed May 13, 2009 9:09 am ZapalacX wrote: In Eva 2.0 Shinji will change into his plugsuit like this.

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Wed May 13, 2009 11:26 am ZapalacX wrote: In Eva 2.0 Shinji will change into his plugsuit like this.

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed May 13, 2009 11:59 am I don't feel bad about doing this.
